eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Jackson, FL; at 09:51 AM ON APR 29, 2026 Effective until 10:51 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: On April 28 2026 the Jackson County Board of Commissioners voted to institute a Burn Ban for Jackson County.  It will remain in effect until conditions improve  and it is deemed safe to lift the order.  For more information visit jacksoncountyfl.gov and click on the Public Notices Tab
